attacking_style: Launches decisive attacks 4-5km from finish on climbs, preferring headwind or tactically complex situations where cooperation breaks down. Opportunistic rather than pure power-based.
team_tactics: Primary role as UAE domestique controlling pace for GC leaders; performs extended tempo pulls even without stage outcome incentives, burning matches to defend team positioning.
terrain_preference: Medium-length climbs where tactical positioning trumps pure climbing watts; struggles on steep gradients and long final ascents where climber hierarchy gets exposed.
vulnerability: Fades badly on extended final climbs after day-long efforts; steep gradient sections temporarily drop him even when holding GC position. Poor climber classification undermines breakaway sustainability.
key_patterns: Veteran pacing: struggles early on climbs but recovers to respectable finishes (2022 Vuelta 4th place)
Domestique commitment: performs extended peloton control work for UAE GC riders without personal stage ambitions
Break fade tendency: holds promising positions from breakaways but collapses on final climbs when tested
GC defense vulnerability: temporarily gapped on steep sections even with substantial overall time advantages (4:07 margin)
form_trajectory: neutral: Recent 2022 results show consistent domestique execution but mixed climbing resilience, suggesting stable role player without progression
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 7
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 12
